markets.question: Will Pumas de la UNAM vs. CF Cruz Azul end in a draw?
markets.description:
In the upcoming game, scheduled for March 14, 2026
If the game ends in a draw, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve to "Yes".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

markets.question: Spread: Los Angeles FC (-1.5)
markets.description:
In the upcoming MLS game, scheduled for March 14 at 10:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Los Angeles FC" if Los Angeles FC win the game by 2 or more goals.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "St. Louis City SC".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

This market will resolve according to the official final score published on mlssoccer.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

markets.question: Los Angeles FC vs. St. Louis City SC: O/U 1.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming MLS game between Los Angeles FC and St. Louis City SC, scheduled for March 14 at 10:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Los Angeles FC and St. Louis City SC combine to score 2 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 2, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on mlssoccer.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

markets.question: Los Angeles FC vs. St. Louis City SC: Both Teams to Score
markets.description:
In the upcoming MLS game between Los Angeles FC and St. Louis City SC, scheduled for March 14 at 10:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Los Angeles FC and St. Louis City SC each score at least one goal during the game.

This market will resolve to "No" if either team fails to score (i.e., if one or both teams finish with zero goals).

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.
